title: Equation as balance
aura_script: Quick check-in. An equation is a math sentence where both sides match.
student_prompt: Drag 5 to the empty side of the balance.
success_response: Yes. Both sides match. That is the feeling of an equation.
repair_response: Close. We want both sides to hold the same value.

title: Equals sign
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. The equals sign means the left and right sides have the same value.
student_prompt: Drag 5 to the empty side of the balance.
success_response: Yes. Both sides match. That is the feeling of an equation.
repair_response: Close. We want both sides to hold the same value.

title: Left side / right side
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. Equations have two sides that we compare.
student_prompt: Drag 5 to the empty side of the balance.
success_response: Yes. Both sides match. That is the feeling of an equation.
repair_response: Close. We want both sides to hold the same value.

title: Variable
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. A variable like x is a number we do not know yet.

visual_spec.caption: x can stand for a number we do not know yet

student_prompt: Tap the tile to reveal the meaning.
success_response: Good. x is a hidden number we are trying to understand.
repair_response: Let us slow this part down and make it smaller.

title: Substitution
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. Substitution means trying a value in place of x.

pairs.right: Substitution means trying a value in place of x.

visual_spec.caption: Connect the idea to its meaning

student_prompt: Match the idea to its meaning.
success_response: Yes. That is the piece we needed.
repair_response: Let us slow this part down and make it smaller.

title: Squared
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. x squared means x multiplied by itself.
student_prompt: Tap the tile to open it.
success_response: Exactly. x² means x multiplied by itself.
repair_response: Let us slow this part down and make it smaller.

title: x² vs 2x
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. x² and 2x look similar but mean different things.

visual_spec.caption: Match each symbol to its meaning

student_prompt: Match each tile to what it means.
success_response: Yes. x² and 2x are different ideas.
repair_response: Let us slow this part down and make it smaller.

title: Quadratic form
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. A quadratic equation has an x² part.

visual_spec.caption: The x² tile makes it quadratic

success_response: Yes. The x² part is the quadratic clue.
repair_response: That part matters too. The special quadratic clue is the x² tile.

title: Parabola
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. The graph of a quadratic is a smooth U-shaped curve.
student_prompt: Move the slider and watch the curve.
success_response: Nice. The curve is the shape quadratics make.
repair_response: Let us slow this part down and make it smaller.

title: Roots
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. Roots are where the curve touches the x-axis.

visual_spec.caption: Roots are where the curve touches the ground line

student_prompt: Tap the glowing dots on the ground line.
success_response: Yes. Those touch points are roots.
repair_response: Let us slow this part down and make it smaller.

title: Solving
aura_script: Here is one small new piece. Solving means finding the x-values that make the equation balance.

pairs.right: Solving means finding the x-values that make the equation balance.

visual_spec.caption: Connect the idea to its meaning

student_prompt: Match the idea to its meaning.
success_response: Yes. That is the piece we needed.
repair_response: Let us slow this part down and make it smaller.
